intent: Ship cohesive UX polish: reduce card density ~20% on Learning Paths and Authors pages, add cover image customization, and redesign the DevOps Roadmap detail page into a map-first experience with list toggle and unified focus panel. Fix accessibility blockers across all touched surfaces.
reviewers: correctness, testing, maintainability, project-standards (always); adversarial, kieran-typescript (conditional)

appliedFixes.description: Removed redundant currentIndex >= 0 guard inside outer guard in RoadmapMapView.tsx line 50

findings.title: Gap resolution flow incomplete — match/replace/import don't convey gap entry context
findings.suggestedFix: Pass the gap entry ID from the GapResolution to handleImportClick/setPickerOpen so the import wizard and inline picker can target the specific gap entry. The import wizard needs a pre-filled search term (from gap entry justification) and auto-resolve on success. The inline picker's handlePickerAddCourse should replace the gap entry instead of adding a new course when operating in match/replace mode. Consider adding a resolvedEntryId state that flows through the picker/wizard callbacks.

findings.title: PathCoverDialog handleRemove cannot roll back Supabase Storage deletion on store failure
findings.suggestedFix: Swap the order: update the store first (optimistic), then delete from Supabase Storage. If the storage delete fails, revert the store. Or use a two-phase approach: delete from storage first, and if the store update fails, re-upload the backup blob.

findings.title: Missing tests for new learning-path components
findings.suggestedFix: Create test files per the plan: PathCoverDialog.test.tsx, and extend LearningPathDetail.test.tsx to cover map/list toggle, FocusPanel rendering, gap resolution UI, delete confirmation dialog, and SPA navigation on path-not-found.

findings.title: PathCoverDialog gradient presets use hardcoded Tailwind classes bypassing design tokens
findings.suggestedFix: Consider defining gradient presets as CSS custom properties or theme tokens rather than hardcoding Tailwind gradient classes. If these are truly decorative-only gradients that don't need theming, document the exception.

findings.title: pathCoverUpload.ts uses console.error for production error logging
findings.suggestedFix: Replace console.error with a structured logging pattern consistent with the app's error tracking. Consider using the toast system or an error boundary pattern for user-facing feedback.

residualRisks: Cover image sync: newly added coverImageUrl/coverPreset fields on LearningPath must be included in the sync engine's schema to survive cross-device sync.
Dexie schema: if cover fields need indexing, the schema.ts must be updated. Current PR doesn't change schema.ts.
FocusPanel conditional rendering: when courseEntries.length === 0, the FocusPanel is hidden entirely. Users with empty paths see no right-rail content.
testingGaps: No tests for PathCoverDialog, RoadmapListView, RoadmapMapView, RoadmapViewToggle, FocusPanel
No test for LearningPathDetail AlertDialog delete confirmation
No test for LearningPathDetail SPA navigation on path-not-found
No test for TrailMap reduced-motion gating of SVG animate elements
No test for AuthorFormDialog required+aria-required on name field
No test for EmptyState role=region + aria-label change
